texts.preview_tail: r over 7 years where I was fully inspired to create, made lots of great friends with the same interests and also learned new and useful techniques to use for my own designs. I love making people smile
texts.full_text: but her creativity didn’t stop there; she soon found herself exploring the world of wooden crafts by utilizing woodshop tools to make unique Christmas presents. This newfound passion led her to create items not just for friends and family, but also for sale in stores and at various events. I owned my own Crafter’s gift store for over 7 years where I was fully inspired to create, made lots of great friends with the same interests and also learned new and useful techniques to use for my own designs. I love making people smile

texts.full_text: Swagbucks ([www.swagbuckssurvey](http://swagbucket.com)), Survey Junkie (survejunkies.com) Earn money or gift cards by sharing opinions on various products/services. - Easy to start, but earnings are relatively low. 3. Selling Products Online Platforms: eBay ([www.ebay.com]), Amazon Handmade (<https://amzn.to/2JL98Xn>) Sell handcrafted goods or used items online through these platforms after setting up a seller account. - Requires inventory management and customer service. 4. Affiliate Marketing Platforms: ClickBank ([www.clickbank.com]), Amazon Associates (<https://affiliat>e.amazon.com) Earn commissions by promoting other people's products or services on your website/blog/social media platforms using unique referral links. - Requires a strong online presence and marketing skills. 5. Stock Photography Platforms: Shutterstock ([www.shutter](http://shutters)tock.com), iStock (<https://is>tomarketplace) Sell your photos/vectors/illustrations to these platforms for licensing fees. - Requires photography or graphic design skills. 6. Online Tutoring Platforms: Chegg (www.tutorcheg[dot]com], VIPKid ([vipkid](http://tutors.vk.com)) Teach students online in subjects you're knowledgeable about, after passing the platform's application process. - Requires teaching skills and often a bachelor’s degree. 7. Testing Websites & Apps Platforms: User Testing (<https>www.usertesting[dot]com), TryMyUI ([trymyui](http://try.myu[i].us)) Earn money by testing websites/apps for usability issues. - Requires no special skills; earnings are low but tasks can be done quickly. 8. Creating & Selling Online Courses Platforms: Udemy (<https>www[dot]udemy.com), Teachable ([teach](http://tchble)able) Create and sell courses on topics you're knowledgeable about. - Requires expertise in the subject matter, course creation skills. 9. Investing & Trading Platforms: Robinhood (<https>www[dot]robinhoo[d].com), Coinbase ([coinb](http://cobase.com) Trade stocks/cryptocurrencies after
